title: Saturated MC
description: Make Vanilla minecraft more saturated and visually appealing. Compatible with other resource packs!
body:
# **<u>Saturated MC</u>**

***Saturated MC*** is a **lightweight resource pack** that makes *Minecraft* look **more vibrant** while keeping the **vanilla style** intact. Colors are *slightly boosted* across the game to create a **cleaner and richer look** without overdoing it.
*Perfect for players who want better visuals without changing how Minecraft feels.*
![Before/After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec115df4ae22011b2c11861637c74003722f9669.jpeg)

### **<u>Features</u>**

- **Slightly more vibrant colors**
- *Vanilla friendly visuals*
- **Clean and minimal look**
- *No performance impact*
- **No mods required**


![Before/After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d6a23449925c31d2c40b5a786ce0eb9bb44d59.jpeg)
This texture pack enhances blocks, items, GUIs, hotbar elements, menu buttons, and entities with slightly more vibrant colors.


---

### **<u>Compatibility</u>**

- **Minecraft Java Edition**
- *Fully compatible with most resource packs*
- **Uses vanilla style textures and models**


---

If you enjoy ***Saturated MC*** and want to support **future updates**, consider supporting me on **PayPal**.
